subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv stated that once Szith Morcane is retaken, avenues can be opened for friendly dealings with surface factions.
source_quote: Money? Once Szith Morcane is retaken, avenues can be opened up for friendly dealings with certain surface factions

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv initially dismissed the party's request for payment before offering a reward from the Drow horde.
source_quote: Initially dismissing the party's request for payment before offering a reward from the Drow horde

subject: Malkyn Grenefeld
fact: The party defeated Malkyn Grenefeld in Hillsfar.
source_quote: defeating Malkyn Grenefeld in Hillsfar

subject: Graz'zt
fact: The demon lord Graz'zt threatened vengeance for his thwarted plot.
source_quote: the wrath of the demon lord Graz'zt, who threatened vengeance for his thwarted plot

subject: Red Plume guards
fact: The Red Plume guards were caught between factions in Hillsfar.
source_quote: Red Plume guards caught between factions

subject: Daein
fact: Daein increased his Charisma score with his ability score improvement.
source_quote: Daein increases his Charisma score with his ability score improvement

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received Bracers of Archery as equipment.
source_quote: Akritas is confirmed to have received Bracers of Archery

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received an Oathbow as equipment.
source_quote: and an Oathbow as equipment

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the head of the Thieves Guild.
source_quote: Isthana, the head of the Thieves Guild

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana appeared in the bloody temple to thank the party for killing the ruling elite.
source_quote: appears in the bloody temple and thanks the party for killing the ruling elite

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana noted that the death of the ruling elite creates many opportunities for her guild.
source_quote: noting it creates many opportunities for her guild

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana offered the party a career in politics and leadership of Hillsfar.
source_quote: offers the party a career in politics and leadership of Hillsfar

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim received Mithral Plate armor.
source_quote: Bramgrim receives Mithral Plate armor

subject: Daein
fact: Daein received Plate Mail +1.
source_quote: Daein receives Plate Mail +1

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas revealed she can cast Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: Akritas reveals she can cast Pass Without Trace

subject: Akritas
fact: The spell Pass Without Trace grants a plus 10 bonus to stealth for the entire party within 30 feet.
source_quote: which grants a plus 10 bonus to stealth for the entire party within 30 feet

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana left through the sewers.
source_quote: Isthana leaves through the sewers

subject: Red Plume guards
fact: Red Plume guards at the front door stood ready to fight but let the party pass without confrontation.
source_quote: stand ready to fight but ultimately let the blood-spattered party pass without confrontation

subject: scale mail armor
fact: The party commissioned custom-made scale mail armor for their owlbear companion.
source_quote: commission custom-made scale mail armor for their owlbear companion

subject: scale mail armor
fact: The scale mail armor for the owlbear was ordered at a cost of 200 gold pieces.
source_quote: order scale mail for the owlbear at a cost of 200 gold pieces

subject: scale mail armor
fact: The scale mail armor will increase the owlbear's armor class to 15.
source_quote: which will increase the owlbear's armor class to 15

subject: scale mail armor
fact: The armor will take a few days to craft.
source_quote: The armor will take a few days to craft

subject: Charles
fact: Charles arrived at the tavern where the party was staying after a few days of rest.
source_quote: Charles arrives at the tavern where the party is staying

subject: Charles
fact: Charles delivered grave news about Graz'zt's continued threat.
source_quote: delivers grave news about Graz'zt's continued threat

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave wishes to speak with the party about a new danger involving fire giants infused with Graz'zt's power.
source_quote: Emerald Enclave wishes to speak with the party about a new danger involving fire giants infused with Graz'zt's power

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas expressed frustration at being drawn into Emerald Enclave affairs despite being a member.
source_quote: Akritas expresses frustration at being drawn into Emerald Enclave affairs despite being a member

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: A Drow Archmage from Szith Morcane brought news of Graz'zt infusing fire giants with demonic power.
source_quote: a Drow Archmage from Szith Morcane has brought news of Graz'zt infusing fire giants with demonic power

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv has distinctive silver hair.
source_quote: distinctive silver hair

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv has emerald green eyes.
source_quote: emerald green eyes

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv has skin so dark it is nearly purple.
source_quote: skin so dark it's nearly purple

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv greeted each party member individually, including the owlbear.
source_quote: greets each party member individually, including the owlbear

subject: owlbear
fact: The owlbear seemed to recognize Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: who seems to recognize him

subject: Drow outpost of Szith Morcane
fact: The Drow outpost of Szith Morcane was sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons from Maerimydra.
source_quote: outpost of Szith Morcane was sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons from the city of Maerimydra

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the Drow outpost of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: outpost's leader, Solom Ned'razak

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is an 18th level wizard.
source_quote: an 18th level wizard

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak fled to the fungal forest known as the Sporedome.
source_quote: fled to the fungal forest known as the Sporedome

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the Drow's chief alchemist.
source_quote: Drow's chief alchemist, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was working on a ritual to cull fiendish blood from the giants.
source_quote: working on a ritual to cull fiendish blood from the giants

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was captured in the raid.
source_quote: was captured in the raid

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Solom Ned'razak learned that Xaven Tanor'this was sold to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Xaven was sold to a creature called Maram il Vass

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass resides in the Den of the Whispered Word in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: resides in the Den of the Whispered Word in the Howling Pits

subject: fire giants
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv warned that the fire giants are powerful enough to destroy a Drow city with all its defenses.
source_quote: fire giants are powerful enough to destroy a Drow city with all its defenses

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv warned that Hillsfar would not survive an attack by the fire giants.
source_quote: Hillsfar would not survive such an attack

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The party arrived at the Silver Shadow Cave in the evening.
source_quote: arrives at the Silver Shadow Cave in the evening

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave is a sacred site for the moon goddess Selûne.
source_quote: a sacred site for the moon goddess Selûne

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave was bathed in soft moonlight with a wide entrance descending into a broader opening.
source_quote: bathed in soft moonlight with a wide entrance descending into a broader opening

subject: level up
fact: The party leveled up to 10th level.
source_quote: levels up to 10th level

subject: guild meeting
fact: The party declined Isthana's offer of leadership in Hillsfar.
source_quote: which they decline, preferring to keep their heads attached

subject: smithy visit
fact: The party visited a smithy to order scale mail for the owlbear.
source_quote: They visit a smithy and order scale mail for the owlbear

subject: tavern rest
fact: The party settled into a tavern to rest while waiting for the armor to be crafted.
source_quote: the party settles into a tavern to rest

subject: fire giant threat
fact: The party must meet representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave near Elventree to discuss the fire giant threat.
source_quote: directs the party to meet representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave near Elventree in a day or so

subject: Xaven's rescue
fact: The Drow have a scheme to stop the fire giants and rescue Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: the Drow have a scheme to stop it

subject: elapsed time
fact: The party rested for a few days before Charles arrived.
source_quote: After a few days of rest

subject: elapsed time
fact: The armor will take a few days to craft.
source_quote: The armor will take a few days to craft

subject: meeting time
fact: The meeting at Silver Shadow Cave is scheduled for a day or so after Charles's warning.
source_quote: in a day or so
